summary: Frontend testing of 3 Care page layout changes: (1) GuidedCarePaths 3-col grid, (2) Care Personally section, (3) CareConciergeModal. All 3 features verified PASSING with comprehensive automated tests.

issues: Service cards in 'Care, Personally' section show mostly 'FEED' category labels (5/8 cards are 'FEED', 1 'VET', 1 'GROOMING', 1 'SITTING'). These are fetched from /api/service-box/services?pillar=care. The content/data may not be fully categorized under the care pillar — most services appear to be nutrition/feeding services. This is a data issue, not a code bug. If desired, care-specific services (grooming, vet, boarding, sitting, behaviour) should be the primary content.

action_items: Optional: Review /api/service-box/services?pillar=care data — most services returned are tagged as 'FEED' category (nutrition/feeding). Consider seeding or tagging care-specific services (grooming, vet, boarding, dental, behaviour) under the care pillar for more relevant 'Care, Personally' section content.
critical_code_review_comments: GuidedCarePaths.jsx: CarePathCard component is well-structured, matches GuidedNutritionPaths pattern. 3-col grid working correctly with responsive CSS (3-col desktop, 2-col tablet, 1-col mobile).

CareConciergeModal.jsx: eyebrow tag uses CSS text-transform:uppercase so it displays 'MOJO'S CARE CONCIERGE' — the spec says '★ Mojo's Care Concierge' eyebrow tag. The actual render is '★ MOJO'S CARE CONCIERGE' (all-caps). This is intentional CSS styling matching the DineConciergeModal pattern.
CareConciergeSection.jsx: Bottom 'Talk to your Care Concierge →' CTA button only appears when services.length > 0. API returning data correctly (8 services).
test_credentials: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123 | Mojo's breed: Indie, coat: long silky, allergy: Chicken

features_verified.guided_care_paths_3col_grid: PASS - GuidedCarePaths shows 3-column grid (3 × 309px equal columns). All 6 care path cards found: grooming, dental, senior, recovery, anxiety, preventive.
features_verified.care_path_card_content: PASS - Each card has: pastel accentBg, icon box (✂️/🦷/🌸/💜/🧡/🌿), title, description, step pills (4 visible with '+1 more'), ★ Mira Pick badge, chevron › arrow.
features_verified.care_path_card_hover: PASS - Cards have data-testid='care-path-{id}' and onMouseEnter/Leave hover effects.
features_verified.path_flow_modal_opens: PASS - Clicking Grooming Path card opens PathFlowModal showing 'Grooming for Mojo', Mira note about long silky coat, 4-step indicator, and grooming options.
features_verified.care_personally_section: PASS - 'Care, Personally' section heading found in both Care tab and Services tab. Subtitle: 'Every care moment for Mojo — concierge-arranged, exactly how you'd want it.'
features_verified.care_personally_service_cards: PASS - 8 service cards rendered from /api/service-box/services?pillar=care API. CelebrateServiceCard grid (4-col desktop).
features_verified.care_personally_cta_button: PASS - 'Talk to your Care Concierge →' green button (data-testid='care-personally-cta') present below service cards.
features_verified.care_concierge_modal_opens: PASS - Clicking 'Talk to your Care Concierge →' CTA opens CareConciergeModal (data-testid='care-intake-modal').
features_verified.care_concierge_modal_eyebrow: PASS - Eyebrow tag shows '★ MOJO'S CARE CONCIERGE' (uppercase via CSS). Spec: '★ Mojo's Care Concierge'.
features_verified.care_concierge_modal_heading: PASS - 'What should Mojo's care experience feel like?' heading confirmed.
features_verified.care_concierge_modal_subtitle: PASS - 'Three questions. Then your Concierge takes over.' subtitle confirmed.
features_verified.care_concierge_modal_q1: PASS - 11 occasion pills present: Grooming & Coat, Vet Visit, Dental Care, Supplements & Nutrition, Boarding & Daycare, Pet Sitting, Senior Care, Behaviour & Training, Emergency Support, Wellness Check, Just because.
features_verified.care_concierge_modal_q2: PASS - Date picker input (mm/dd/yyyy) + 'Not sure yet' button both present. 'Not sure yet' toggles to '✓ Not sure yet' when clicked.
features_verified.care_concierge_modal_q3: PASS - Textarea with placeholder 'Coat type, allergies, temperament, what calms Mojo…' present.
features_verified.submit_btn_disabled_before_selection: PASS - Submit button is disabled (cursor: not-allowed, background: rgb(224, 237, 230), color: rgb(153,153,153)) before any occasion is selected.
features_verified.submit_btn_enabled_after_selection: PASS - After selecting 'Grooming & Coat': disabled=false, cursor=pointer, background=linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(64,145,108), rgb(45,106,79)) — green gradient confirmed.
features_verified.services_tab_concierge: PASS - Care Services tab shows CareConcierge (dark CTA box) + CareConciergeSection (Care, Personally) both present.
features_verified.talk_concierge_btn_opens_care_modal: PASS - '🌿 Talk to your Care Concierge' button (data-testid='care-talk-concierge-btn') in dark CTA box opens CareConciergeModal (NOT old GroomingFlow). Modal contains 'Three questions. Then your Concierge takes over.' confirming it's CareConciergeModal.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Test user: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123. Mojo's breed: Indie, coat: long silky, allergy: Chicken. All 3 Care page layout changes from this ticket verified working at 100%. (1) GuidedCarePaths: 3-col grid with 6 CarePathCards, each with pastel bg, icon, title, desc, step chips, Mira Pick badge, chevron. PathFlowModal opens on click. (2) CareConciergeSection 'Care, Personally': fetches 8 services from API, shows CelebrateServiceCard grid, 'Talk to your Care Concierge →' CTA button opens CareConciergeModal. (3) CareConciergeModal: green theme, 3 questions, submit disabled until Q1 occasion selected. Both care tab and services tab have CareConciergeSection. Dark CTA 'Talk to your Care Concierge' button opens new CareConciergeModal (not old GroomingFlow). Service card sub-labels in 'Care, Personally' show mostly 'FEED' (5/8) — minor data categorization observation only.
